sobre.title: About Gentle Laughter — events production, booking and logistics in Lisbon
sobre.description: Gentle Laughter Unipessoal Lda. Founded in 2025 by Célio Correia. Production, booking and logistics in Lisbon.
sobre.t2: Gentle Laughter Unipessoal Lda. Production, booking and logistics under a single point of contact.
sobre.t4: One structure, nine lines of work.
sobre.t5: Gentle Laughter was founded in 2025 by Célio Correia in Lisbon. Before incorporating, Célio had organised events since the age of seventeen with his twin brother. In 2007 they won the contest for best PRs in Lisbon and founded Gémeos Organização, under which they delivered events for years.
sobre.t6: In May 2025, on leaving that role, he founded Gentle Laughter to return to what he knows: events production, coordination and execution, with a range of services from stagehands to fleet, from technical rental to fado booking.
sobre.t7: Stories that last: coordination and production by Gentle Laughter.
sobre.t15: For proposal requests or queries, get in touch directly.
sobre.t16: An event or production in mind?
sobre.t17: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions — events production in Lisbon | Gentle Laughter
faq.description: Questions about Gentle Laughter: quotes, lead time, coverage area, payment methods.
faq.t1: Rigour in the detail, clarity in the answer.
faq.t2: Find here the answers about how we operate. If you prefer a direct contact, we reply within hours.
faq.t3: What's your availability for new projects?
faq.t4: On request. Single point of contact from first inquiry to load-out. Structured proposals usually within the same day.
faq.t5: Do you work outside Greater Lisbon?
faq.t6: Yes, we cover the whole country. For projects requiring extended travel, we coordinate all crew accommodation and transfer logistics, itemised in the quote.
faq.t8: We issue tax invoices for all services, ensuring full fiscal transparency for both private clients and businesses (B2B).
faq.t9: Do you work with partner production agencies?
faq.t10: Yes. A large share of our work supports other production companies and agencies with operational crews (stagehands), special effects and technical logistics.
faq.t12: Always. We issue invoices to end clients and to businesses, with or without withholding tax as applicable.
faq.t14: Didn't find what you were looking for?
faq.t16: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
livro.title: The night of Célio Correia — Gentle Laughter
livro.description: Book published by Gentle Laughter exploring the nuances of night and spectacle.
livro.t1: Published in 2024 by Célio Correia, the book traces the path of an organiser of Lisbon nights from his teenage years to the foundation of Gentle Laughter.
livro.t2: It launches with Cordel d'Prata in Porto, and is in Lisbon at the João Verde Bookshop, Bertrand do Chiado, Bertrand Verde or directly with Célio Correia.
livro.t5: Talk to us about availability or in-bulk orders.
formulario.title: Contact — events production and booking in Lisbon | Gentle Laughter
formulario.description: Tell us the line, the context and your preferred channel. We'll structure the right solution.
formulario.t1: Submitting the form opens WhatsApp with your message pre-filled. We confirm the same day.
parceiros.title: Partners — operational network for events in Lisbon | Gentle Laughter
parceiros.description: Gentle Laughter operational network: Kardamomo with Chef Jigna Bhanji (catering), Paradise Streets (transfers) and Vibe Criativa (creative direction). Adjacent partner categories in progress.
parceiros.t3: Who joins us when the brief calls for skills outside our core. Each partner has measured field experience, in their own cases.
parceiros.t6: Oriental cuisine served alongside the Gentle Laughter food trailer. Samosas and wraps (meat and vegetarian), prepared by Chef Jigna Bhanji, with shared production and logistics. Debuted at the Tremoço Festival at Lisbon's Faculty of Architecture.
parceiros.t9: Fleet and drivers for band, artist and technical crew. Joint operation on show weekends: punctuality in the rider, comfort and discretion in the car. Gentle Laughter internal fleet (V250, E-class, compact) supplemented with Paradise Streets when the scale requires it.
parceiros.t12: Creative direction and audiovisual content for campaigns, launches and behind-the-scenes. Collaborating on the visual narrative of events and productions, from pre-production to final cut.
parceiros.t15: Other capabilities within the network, outside of events operations. Introductions case by case, according to the context of the request. Names disclosed once agreements are in place.
parceiros.t18: Residential lettings and sales, focused on Lisbon and surroundings.
parceiros.t21: Purchase, sale and automotive credit, with process support.
parceiros.t24: Mortgage, consolidated and automotive credit, with a broker authorised by Banco de Portugal.
parceiros.t27: Tax and accounting support for businesses and self-employed professionals.
parceiros.t30: Institutional websites and e-commerce, hosting and support. Includes the site you're reading.
parceiros.t33: Propose a partnership or request an introduction.
parceiros.t34: Tell us the context. We'll assess fit and follow-up.
eventos.title: Events organisation in Lisbon — weddings, christenings, festivals and arenas | Gentle Laughter
eventos.description: Integrated organisation of christenings, weddings, private events and large-scale productions (festivals and arenas) in Portugal.
eventos.t2: From booking the venue to the last chair packed away. Christenings, weddings, private events and large-scale productions, festivals and arenas, led by a team that also produces, books and lights when needed.
eventos.t7: Prior coordination with couple, sponsors, hosts or promoters. Venue search and booking, catering, entertainment and suppliers. Technical schedule, rehearsal where applicable, day-of supervision, build and tear-down.
eventos.t9: For festivals, arenas and large-scale productions, Rock in Rio, MEO Arena, Coliseu, Campo Pequeno, Multiusos de Odivelas, we take on operational coordination, stagehands, drivers, security partner, equipment rental and on-the-ground crew management. Working in consortium with promoters and producers.
eventos.t11: An initial meeting to understand scale, budget and non-negotiables. From there, a single point of contact bridges every supplier and the client decides only what they actually need to decide.
eventos.t12: On request, with written proposal after the initial meeting.
eventos.t13: From intimacy to the bigger stage.
eventos.t14: From a ceremony in an intimate room to a festival stage, we keep a single interlocutor for the client.
eventos.t17: Transfer of artists and technical crew.
eventos.t19: How much does it cost to organise a wedding in Lisbon?
eventos.t20: Varies with scale, venue and type. Initial meeting at no cost. Written proposal after briefing, with itemised suppliers (catering, entertainment, set design, logistics).
eventos.t21: Which areas do you cover for events?
eventos.t22: Based in Lisbon, priority coverage in the metropolitan area, Sintra, Cascais, Oeiras, Almada, Setúbal. Available for travel to the rest of mainland Portugal on consultation of logistics.
eventos.t23: Next step: tell us the date.
eventos.t24: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
agenciamento.title: Fado booking — Vanessa Alves | Gentle Laughter Lisbon
agenciamento.description: Fado artist booking. Exclusive representation of Vanessa Alves. Technical riders, transfer and hospitality for promoters.
agenciamento.t2: Exclusive representation of Vanessa Alves. Riders, transfer, hospitality and contracts handled by a single person.
agenciamento.t5: A previously unreleased fado record, with original repertoire and reinterpreted classics. Released in 2026, available for online streaming, orders and live dates.
agenciamento.t6: Full technical credits (label, studio, musical direction) disclosed once confirmed.
agenciamento.t15: Concert halls, festivals, fado houses, corporate events, weddings, embassies, municipal cultural programmes. Available for dates in Portugal, with possible travel abroad on consultation.
agenciamento.t23: Availability and written proposal request, no round of calls. Technical rider and contract template sent as PDF. Available for pre-meetings with the promoter's production when the scale of the event justifies it.
agenciamento.t25: Interview requests, high-resolution graphic material, biography and recent history provided on consultation. Confirmation of presence required at least 48h in advance.
agenciamento.t27: How much does it cost to book Vanessa Alves for a concert?
agenciamento.t28: Fee varies with format (voice and guitar, intimate quartet, concert with strings), duration and logistics. A request with date, venue and type leads to a written proposal, with technical rider and contract template as PDF.
agenciamento.t29: How far ahead should I book a date?
agenciamento.t30: Recommended 4 to 8 weeks for Lisbon dates, 8 to 12 weeks for long-distance travel or productions with complex riders. For Christmas and summer dates, longer lead times.
agenciamento.t31: Want to book a date or request a proposal?
agenciamento.t32: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
casos.title: Recent cases — events production portfolio | Gentle Laughter
casos.description: Real Gentle Laughter cases: Tremoço Festival AEFA, Vanessa Alves album, arena production, stadium effects, open-air stagehands and artist transfers.
casos.t3: Six recent productions, with images, video and reels. From the food trailer at a university to the open-air stage.
casos.t8: First field event with the Gentle Laughter food trailer. Oriental samosas and wraps (meat and vegetarian), Chef Jigna Bhanji's production in partnership with Kardamomo, alongside AEFA's Tremoço fair. Full operation: vehicle logistics, kitchen build, service and tear-down.
casos.t9: Food trailer in service: with Kardamomo and Chef Jigna.
casos.t10: Prep on the eve of the event.
casos.t15: Live presentation of Vanessa Alves' new record, with Gentle Laughter coordinating. Full house, seated audience, solo session with Portuguese guitar and viola. Booking, technical rider and stage production handled in-house.
casos.t20: Gentle Laughter crew in an arena context. Stage build, flight-case positioning, soundcheck, FOH, technical supervision and tear-down. Working in consortium with promoters and producers.
casos.t24: CO2 and cold pyrotechnics on team entries
casos.t25: Licensed cold-pyrotechnics and CO2 operation on team entries and celebration moments. Full protocol compliance with the sports entity and venue security. In-house equipment.
casos.t30: Stagehands service at Paula Fernandes' concert at Monsanto Open Air. Mission given, mission delivered from start to finish, with a Gentle Laughter crew increasingly skilled in large outdoor stages.
casos.t37: In partnership with Paradise Streets, transfer and driver service for band and artist over a show weekend. Punctuality, comfort and discretion: the minimum standard for a well-honoured rider.
casos.t41: Short day-to-day moments: prep, behind-the-scenes and creative partnerships.
casos.t48: The next case could be yours.
casos.t49: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
roulote.title: Food trailer & production catering — samosas and wraps in Lisbon | Gentle Laughter
roulote.description: Food trailer and catering for festivals and private events. Samosas and wraps prepared on the spot by uniformed staff.
roulote.t16: Solutions from quick snack to sit-down meal.
roulote.t18: Comforting and varied cuisine. Balanced menus designed for the physical demands of technical crews.
roulote.t20: Mandatory at every crew meal. Fresh vegetable soup and sweets or fruit to close the cycle.
roulote.t22: Our handmade signature. Meat or vegetable, always crisp and served at the right temperature.
roulote.t24: Chicken or falafel options with fresh ingredients. Light, fast meal for those who can't stop.
roulote.t26: Coffee, tea, water and snack service for production rooms, meetings or dressing rooms.
roulote.t28: Simplified meal management by headcount or by food-trailer operating hours.
roulote.t31: We adapt the setup to the venue. We can operate from the autonomous trailer or build a temporary canteen in support rooms or tents.
roulote.t35: Food trailer in service: Tremoço Festival, Lisbon Faculty of Architecture.
roulote.t37: Does the food trailer work at festivals and private events in Lisbon?
roulote.t38: Yes, both. Coverage of Lisbon and the metropolitan area. For longer distances, on consultation, with vehicle logistics and energy included in the quote.
roulote.t39: What kind of food do you serve?
roulote.t40: Oriental samosas and wraps (meat and vegetarian), prepared by Chef Jigna Bhanji in partnership with Kardamomo. Menus adapted to headcount and service duration.
roulote.t41: How many guests and on what date?
roulote.t42: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution for your event or production.
efeitos-especiais.title: Special effects for stages — cold pyrotechnics, CO2, fog | Gentle Laughter
efeitos-especiais.description: Special effects for events in Portugal: cold pyrotechnics, CO2, fog, hazers, confetti and streamers. Operation coordinated under one contact.
efeitos-especiais.t3: Combinations designed around the cue sheet: which moment, which duration, which height, which stage framing.
efeitos-especiais.t5: Stage sparklers and cold fountains for entries, exits and key moments. Compatible with low ceilings and indoor venues.
efeitos-especiais.t7: High-impact white columns for musical drops. 2 to 8-unit setups, synced from FOH.
efeitos-especiais.t9: Floor-hugging white blanket for theatrical entries, first dance and photography. Dry-ice or low-fog machine.
efeitos-especiais.t11: Atmospheric ambience that supports the lighting work. Constant density throughout the show.
efeitos-especiais.t13: Pneumatic or electric, reloadable. Slow-fall confetti, metallic or custom.
efeitos-especiais.t14: Manual or electric, range up to 25 m. Show closure, ceremony "yes" confirmation, tour opening.
efeitos-especiais.t18: Operation by qualified and specialised technicians.
efeitos-especiais.t20: Coordination centralised at Gentle Laughter: a single contact for the client.
efeitos-especiais.t21: EFXS on stage: fire effects synced with lighting.
efeitos-especiais.t24: Effects are chosen for the moment they serve, not the name in the catalogue.
efeitos-especiais.t28: Product reveal with CO₂ and jets, fog curtain for speaker entry, closing streamers.
efeitos-especiais.t30: Compact operation, tailored to the room. Low-profile combinations that don't dominate the space.
efeitos-especiais.t33: Multi-cue setups, equipment redundancy, prior coordination with firefighters and venue security.
efeitos-especiais.t35: Risk analysis before the first effect.
efeitos-especiais.t36: Every operation is preceded by a technical visit and risk analysis of the space. When the type of effect or capacity requires it, prior coordination with firefighters, private venue security and event management.
efeitos-especiais.t37: Technical visit and written deployment plan.
efeitos-especiais.t38: Trained operators with active professional insurance.
efeitos-especiais.t39: Compliance with ANEPC regulations, health authorities and applicable municipal regulations.
efeitos-especiais.t40: Stage deployment: effects integrated into the scenic plan.
efeitos-especiais.t42: Tell us the moment. We design the effect.
efeitos-especiais.t43: Indicate the event type, date, space and the moment when the effect enters your narrative (entry, drop, encore, first dance, reveal). We return a written proposal with type, scale, sync and associated licensing.
efeitos-especiais.t45: How much do cold pyrotechnics cost for a show?
efeitos-especiais.t46: Price per machine and per moment. Includes licensed operator and venue-approved safety plan. For team entries, celebrations or specific moments, request with date and number of cues leads to a detailed quote.
efeitos-especiais.t47: Do you operate special effects in stadiums and arenas?
efeitos-especiais.t48: Yes. Experience in stadiums (José Gomes, Amadora) and arenas in Lisbon. Full protocol compliance with the sports entity, venue security and firefighters. Licensed in-house equipment.
efeitos-especiais.t49: Which effect, at which point in the night?
efeitos-especiais.t50: Tell us the context. We'll structure the right solution.
